title: Warm up
content: Three cities are depicted from the perspective of a car interior: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide highlights the theme of urban transformation in China through taxi imagery and cityscapes.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session focuses on investigating local features, formulating development strategies, and evaluating outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Cities are matched with specific development strategies: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Session 2 Ask & Analyse.
content: Participants select questions to engage in critical analysis and comparative insights, acting as city observers or city experts.

title: Session 3 Promote Your City!
content: Groups act as City Promotion Ambassadors to deliver promotional speeches, with roles for taxi drivers sharing stories and city experts explaining strategies.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: Taxi drivers' perspectives on city development emphasize sustainable urban development, tourism and economic growth, and technology and tradition integration.
key_claims: An evolving nation and unique development strategies
Each city develops strategies based on local features
